inputs.name: colorScheme
inputs.description:
Defines the color scheme of the component.
There are 10 predefined schemes.
To use one you can set a number from `"1"` to `"10"`. The `colorScheme` `"1"` will be set by default.

inputs.name: design
inputs.description: Defines the design type of the component.

inputs.name: hideStateIcon
inputs.description: Defines if the default state icon is shown.

inputs.name: interactive
inputs.description: Defines if the component is interactive (focusable and pressable).

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Defines predefined size of the component.

inputs.name: wrappingType
inputs.description:
Defines how the text of a component will be displayed when there is not enough space.

*Note:** For option "Normal" the text will wrap and the
words will not be broken based on hyphenation.

outputs.name: ui5Click
outputs.description:
Fired when the user clicks on an interactive tag.

*Note:** The event will be fired if the `interactive` property is `true`
